title: Design and planning documentation
goal: Document the workorder tree view decision, UX approach, access model and implementation workflow before code changes.
requirements: Document that tree mode is an alternative projection over the same server-visible workorder dataset.
Document that customer branch visibility is a server-side access change.
Document UI/UX principles and right drawer behavior.
Document implementation task packets and verification commands.
acceptance: ADR exists and contains context, decision, alternatives, consequences and acceptance criteria.
Active planning file exists and describes UX, architecture, risks and stages.
Workflow block exists with brief, architect plan, task packets, executor report and acceptance.
Backlog links to ADR, active plan and workflow block.
